name: Mucky Weekender Messages
messages: Stay hydrated — future you will thank you.
Take a breath and enjoy the moment — you’re doing great.
Look after your mates, and let them look after you.
Stretch your shoulders, unclench your jaw — you deserve to feel good.
If it feels overwhelming, step back for a moment and reset.
Music hits different when you’re kind to yourself.
You’re allowed to rest — even at a festival.
Check your pockets: phone, wallet, keys.
Drink some water, then drink a little more.
You’re not lost — you’re exploring.
Smile at someone — it might make their night.
Your tent isn’t going anywhere — take your time.
You’re doing better than you think.
Take a moment to look at the sky.
Be gentle with yourself tonight.
You’re safe, you’re sound, you’re good.
Slow down — the night isn’t going anywhere.
You’re allowed to feel everything and nothing.
Don’t miss Dub Pistols on the Main Stage at 9PM — you know it’s going off.
Grab your crew — the Pistols are about to tear it up.
Barry says drink water, dance harder, and look after each other.
New Dub Pistols album dropping soon — keep your ears ready.
If you’re wandering, head towards the bass — it usually leads somewhere good.
Silent Disco kicks off at midnight — bring the energy.
If you need a breather, step to the edge of the crowd and reset.
Lost your mates? Meet at the main bar — classic move.
Don’t forget: the merch tent has limited‑run Mucky Weekender gear.
If you see someone struggling, check in — it takes two seconds.
Tonight’s about memories — make the good ones stick.
Eat something — even a quick snack keeps you going.
If you’re heading to the campsite, take a buddy with you.
Charge your phone when you can — future you will appreciate it.
The vibes are strong tonight — keep them positive.
Respect the staff, respect the space, respect each other.
If you’re cold, move to the music — it works every time.
Don’t forget to recycle — keep the site beautiful.
Catch the lights at the forest stage — trust us.
You’re part of the Mucky family now — look after the people around you.
